textByHashes.e54082e2d503de7dc9221937f93ff4f7ba8ea8f2: It's always the butler, isn't it.
textByHashes.5ff868eef14ad3cf94f6a6e63df4ad61f9344536: How often do we get to handle a murder?
textByHashes.48d451a03c8958e94eeb04bfdfbe4400942e25da: Poor Livius... He wasn't acting this time.
textByHashes.4a53e12ba1c08da937344ad3e7d8c65c09cb1a3b: You just happened to be found standing in a closed room with a dead body?
textByHashes.611c6a0b577bfbe39fd168821732faa926c6da8c: I suppose I could try tasting it...
textByHashes.a1b1553204cd055a2559032d6426f241c9e8dae8: Well, then it won't taste like wine, will it?
textByHashes.6978ecb6fdb2f2564fc76fcd7f61f08244e3c1fc: Oh no you won't! You're going to wait right there and answer some questions!
textByHashes.fedf2d1e26c623ec5bd49f7316ebc07c2b9fa075: So you were just trying to help?
textByHashes.26829996591df08147d93ed924ae80f9cca6ac6d: I'm afraid we can't just let you go. Not without an investigation.
textByHashes.b42f8ce076da1a4e02b5d30555b611ad5f3b8bb2: Could be a career ender, really.
textByHashes.b6ac37aa9abc6bf05c980f96092c0de65b0af31c: Wait... are we meant to have...
textByHashes.c259bc15236da93b79512ceae8f379d826a1f5e7: Adala? Do we know an Adala?
textByHashes.523bdc78340d93f5f92c8f5d6ce385d936c9a513: Why do I get the feeling we're not doing a good job of actually investigating this?
textByHashes.a588053be0cc512ed793bdcefbfed2291904c50b: I'm not sure I like the implication that we can't solve it ourselves.
textByHashes.3b8b50049ce2054d3092999604aa1afe89c6f3ea: You make a fair point, Hutza.
textByHashes.2daa186d0a2fe6b3d149fba463b85e59d4bbef32: Perfect! Shall we get to investigating then?
textByHashes.0ca28519e13efb14c5401cb7cbb4e20a5ae0dd3f: No doubt you'll also want to question everyone. We'll keep them busy for you until you're ready. We'll also give you a case file to track your notes in!
textByHashes.41793338a852be08d926471215159a423d4029f4: You'll probably also want to do a bit of questioning up here as well.
textByHashes.b71cfed1ae74090b959904366db977122a3817d1: You will probably be dead by then though...
textByHashes.dac18e56c7e345dda22bb77b1ce0d4197073e64c: Do you think you could pin down a suspect?
textByHashes.2805d7e26241adc3069534142da551af3b5704ec: What if they hired someone to do it for them?
textByHashes.a77b91a5bb22fb2527812fc208438a1144e8bbf1: Have we been keeping tabs on all the butlers? What if one's escaped! The killer might already be in the wind!
textByHashes.913ad32a74862d6cd1093f425391036e3028d828: Ah, yes. We came down when we heard the commotion. They wouldn't have been able to get out before then.
textByHashes.f758e92d094dc25ef915228624ec67c3008a6e79: You probably shouldn't mention that in front of us.
textByHashes.e8af0c54c97c0d5c7522d9eb5e8afc7aee9757ae: How is your pocket checking going?
textByHashes.1fd7956a99120c2a663efbdd19534af3c3e63c43: Well, keep up the good work.
textByHashes.a70a94cbeac4725935f8a16f25a7ba6aacfbf7e2: She was the one who wasn't accounted for when the murder took place, right?
textByHashes.90db50bc1bb72500e8a2fb11ca08714fc4d3eb5b: Perhaps one of them is responsible... or indeed both of them.
textByHashes.349aebcbec7f355b6141fc8e04f5f08958c2d438: This bit's all up to you, .
textByHashes.5b022366062e0387f62316f4b9dfeada550ee39d: She may be telling the truth, , but either way, we know she's a criminal now.
textByHashes.2433c6eb979d042e3ffb67cd217622214e10ebe4: Well... we don't really have one, but the play is about to start and we still might have a killer on the loose.
textByHashes.5b1b3d3fd7c0bb499af8e392afb687c7d4a6f383: The stairs over there lead down to the backstage area. That's where the actors, including Livius, were getting ready for the play. That seems like the best place to check for any missing clues.
textByHashes.1fcc057090ad1d2dd78c9eafc7ffc0f3063e73c0: Keep at it! I'm sure you can solve this one!
textByHashes.acd644481ba76c18d8f7e0b8819567d097202157: Yes, we need to confront the killer! Who was it, ?
textByHashes.1283a07830d3029976c4cbcc722a8a2c9a79bbbc: But how? We established that he couldn't have accessed the cellar.
textByHashes.508afc7b86b7df6a9e3655adec717c8282405f0a: So it was her? But why?
textByHashes.309e77e60320b51c5c9afe67ccf30ceb5573211d: How would he have gained from killing Livius?
textByHashes.52d1f856e3bf98ff80c869e87ae2d0ccbde23acd: I don't think she ever had the opportunity either.
textByHashes.b35cb4f844c4015996d4aca5296793b00f895fe5: I thought we'd ruled them out?
textByHashes.a122512f87c6564101ef81ccde193f36d0e7ff53: I suppose that makes sense, but she wasn't the only one who had access to that passage.
textByHashes.66e16d9b7a5acfa6bc80ba1741ec515655db87ba: I suppose this does all make sense, but are you certain?
textByHashes.a843e088b84ab78e21712ff255a1e5f06942b4f8: Except for the whole fake butler act.
textByHashes.3f1439cb7c010f54975c9c8bbf2efdca3bcaa393: And then we'd have another murder mystery on our hands...
textByHashes.8b5df3208aaa0760965b8b161cc187e1403e0620: But she doesn't have a motive... She also isn't the only one who had access to the passage and poison.
textByHashes.1c32988078f5e02572163b90386af77197f3198e: You?! Goodness, it's the crime of the century! Right, come with us!
textByHashes.136b7b70212521323be70fb1f88ea9463c48ec2c: We need to confront the killer! Who was it, ?
textByHashes.b1a6777d62079989498cfb78822f9021e27d195c: I can't believe it was all an accident...
textByHashes.9f510550e24c37653446eab83965d6e7cc1988cb: To be fair to us, you did seem like the perfect suspect.
textByHashes.194e7da176a610ca495db956d8b72baa7bf4eed9: Thanks for your help again, . It's good to know people like you are around.
